tree.setup: Beijing Capital Airport, Terminal 3, where the ceiling arcs overhead like the ribcage of a sleeping giant. You're checking in for a domestic flight to Chengdu, and the check-in agent, Ms. Shen, processes passengers with the choreographed efficiency of someone who has boarded approximately fifty thousand people onto aircraft and considers each boarding pass a small work of art.
tree.setup_zh: 北京首都机场T3航站楼，天花板在头顶弯成弧形，像沉睡巨人的肋骨。你正在办理飞往成都的国内航班值机手续。值机员沈小姐处理旅客的效率如同编排过的舞蹈——她已经送大约五万人登上飞机，并且把每张登机牌都视为一件小小的艺术品。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您好，请出示您的身份证和行程单。
turns.text_pinyin: nín hǎo, qǐng chūshì nín de shēnfènzhèng hé xíngchéng dān.
turns.text_en: Hello, please show your ID and itinerary.

options.text_zh: 你好，这是我的身份证。我坐下午两点去成都的航班。能不能帮我选一个靠过道的座位？
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, zhè shì wǒ de shēnfènzhèng. wǒ zuò xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn qù Chéngdū de hángbān. néng bu néng bāng wǒ xuǎn yí gè kào guòdào de zuòwèi?
options.text_en: Hello, here's my ID. I'm on the 2 PM flight to Chengdu. Can you give me an aisle seat?
options.feedback: ID ready, flight identified, seat preference stated — Ms. Shen's fingers dance across the keyboard. You're her favorite kind of passenger.

options.text_zh: 给你，身份证在这里。去成都的。
options.text_pinyin: gěi nǐ, shēnfènzhèng zài zhèlǐ. qù Chéngdū de.
options.text_en: Here, my ID. Going to Chengdu.
options.feedback: She finds the booking. Seat assignment will be random unless you ask.

options.text_zh: 我的航班是哪个？我忘了时间。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ de hángbān shì nǎge? wǒ wàng le shíjiān.
options.text_en: Which is my flight? I forgot the time.
options.feedback: Ms. Shen checks. She's encountered this before — usually from people who book flights the way they order lunch.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的，靠过道的座位给您安排好了。23C。您有托运行李吗？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de, kào guòdào de zuòwèi gěi nín ānpái hǎo le. èrshísān C. nín yǒu tuōyùn xíngli ma?
turns.text_en: OK, aisle seat arranged for you. 23C. Do you have any checked luggage?

options.text_zh: 有一个箱子要托运。这个背包我随身带上飞机。
options.text_pinyin: yǒu yí gè xiāngzi yào tuōyùn. zhège bēibāo wǒ suíshēn dài shàng fēijī.
options.text_en: One suitcase to check. This backpack I'll carry on.
options.feedback: Clear distinction between checked and carry-on. Ms. Shen tags the suitcase with practiced precision.
She weighs it — within the limit. Onto the belt it goes.

options.text_zh: 两个都要带上飞机可以吗？
options.text_pinyin: liǎng gè dōu yào dài shàng fēijī kěyǐ ma?
options.text_en: Can I bring both on the plane?
options.feedback: She eyes the suitcase. If it's under 20 inches, maybe. If not, it's going on the belt.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 行李18公斤，没有超重。这是您的登机牌。登机口是B26，下午一点四十开始登机。注意听广播。
turns.text_pinyin: xíngli shíbā gōngjīn, méiyǒu chāo zhòng. zhè shì nín de dēngjī pái. dēngjī kǒu shì B èrshíliù, xiàwǔ yì diǎn sìshí kāishǐ dēngjī. zhùyì tīng guǎngbō.
turns.text_en: Luggage is 18 kg — no overweight. Here's your boarding pass. Gate B26, boarding starts at 1:40 PM. Listen for the announcements.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Thank her and head to the gate.

options.text_zh: 谢谢！B26，一点四十。安检在哪个方向？
options.text_pinyin: xièxie! B èrshíliù, yì diǎn sìshí. ānjiǎn zài nǎge fāngxiàng?
options.text_en: Thanks! B26, 1:40. Which direction is security?
options.feedback: Repeating the key info and asking the next logical question. Ms. Shen points to the left with a gesture as precise as a ballet move.
She's already calling the next passenger. The choreography continues.

options.text_pinyin: chāo zhòng de huà yào duō fù qián ma?
options.text_en: If it was overweight, would I pay more?
options.feedback: A hypothetical question at check-in — Ms. Shen answers without breaking rhythm: yes, roughly 1% of the ticket price per kilo.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese domestic flights require 身份证 (ID card) or passport. Checked luggage (托运行李) is usually free up to 20-23 kg depending on the airline. Boarding (登机) typically starts 30-40 minutes before departure. Always check your gate number (登机口) — Chinese airports are large.
